title: polyscias filicifolia
intro: Polyscias filicifolia, also known as the fern-leaf Polyscias or Fern-leaf Manglietia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Polyscias filicifolia include its potential to alleviate fever, reduce pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Polyscias filicifolia are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
